TCF-Canada
Language
TCF-Canada
The
TCF-Canada
(
T
est
de
C
onnaissance
du
F
rançais
)
is a French language proficiency test that meets the standards of Immigration, Refugees, and Citizenship Canada (IRCC). TCF-Canada results
are accepted for the purposes of economic immigration or for obtaining Canadian citizenship.
The TCF-Canada consists of
four mandatory parts
. It evaluates general French language proficiency in
listening
comprehension,
reading
comprehension,
speaking
and
writing
.
For more information regarding the exam, please visit our
FAQ
section
here. For immigration inquiries, please visit the
IRCC
website
.
Practice and perfect your TCF exam with PREPmyfuture! Online preparation available for $80 (click here to purchase), or bundled with
your TCF exam for $70.
We offer TCF preparation workshops!
Learn the methodology and strategies needed to ace your TCF exam. New sessions starting every month.
TCF Exam Priority Access: Skip the Line!
By registering for a TCF workshop, you may have the opportunity to reserve a spot for an upcoming TCF exam organized by Alliance Française
Vancouver.
How it works:
Participants in this workshop receive priority access to selected TCF exam spots: you skip the line!
Exam dates are assigned by Alliance Française and cannot be chosen by candidates.
The exam will take place after the end of the workshop (exact date disclosed in the workshop description).
If a spot is reserved for you, you will have
one week
to confirm your participation and complete the exam payment.
Not
transferrable.
Reserved spots that are not confirmed and paid within the deadline will be released to other candidates.
Important:
Admission to the workshop is subject to prerequisites. Candidates who do not meet the required level or prerequisites will not be able to
participate in the workshop or benefit from the priority access to TCF exam spots.
By registering to the exam, you accept the general policies of Alliance Française Vancouver.
Choose your TCF exam below, fill the form, and pay online
'Written & Oral' indicates that all four exam components (reading, listening, writing, and speaking) take place on the same day.
Opening multiple tabs or repeatedly refreshing the page may cancel your reservation and prevent successful registration.
Tip:
Log in to your account in advance and have your passport number ready before registration opens.

For all TCF inquiries please email us at
tef.tcf@alliancefrancaise.ca
Please allow 2 business days for a response.
All exam purchases must be made online. In-person and telephone requests cannot be accommodated.
Location
All exams will take place in-person, 6161 Cambie Street, Vancouver, BC.
Results will be sent via e-mail within 3 to 4 weeks after the examination date.
The candidates will be notified of the exact time of the TCF exam on their notification letter one week prior to the exam. All
candidates must read and agree to the registration policies at the bottom of the TCF FORM. Prices are subject to change without notice.
Our
members
have a 10% discount on TCF tests. Prior registration,
please make sure that you need the TCF for your application as registrations to the TCF are final. Aside from the oral expression
test, all tests are completed on computers using a QWERTY keyboard. French accents will be accessible through the plateform designed by
FEI. Registration to the TCF is final. Neither refund nor credit will be granted.
Recorrection: France Education International must temporarily suspend the recorrection system
from
September
1, 2026, in order to im
p
rove
tools and streamline requests. The service is ex
p
ected
to resume
in
fall 2027.
